item.title: Hidden Fees Can Change the Deal
item.description: A closer look at how hidden fees can make a car deal look very different from the ad. What should buyers check before signing?

media:content.media:title: Hidden Fees Can Change the Deal
media:content.media:description: A closer look at how hidden fees can make a car deal look very different from the ad. What should buyers check before signing?

item.title: Trucks Dealers Hope Buyers Don’t Inspect
item.description: Some trucks get overlooked during shopping, and that can lead to problems later. This video looks at why careful inspection matters when buying used trucks. What should buyers check first?

media:content.media:title: Trucks Dealers Hope Buyers Don’t Inspect
media:content.media:description: Some trucks get overlooked during shopping, and that can lead to problems later. This video looks at why careful inspection matters when buying used trucks. What should buyers check first?

item.title: One Number Can Hurt Your Trade-In
item.description: Using the wrong number on a trade-in can give the dealership more leverage. Learn how pricing and trade-in details can affect your deal. What should buyers watch before they negotiate?

media:content.media:title: One Number Can Hurt Your Trade-In
media:content.media:description: Using the wrong number on a trade-in can give the dealership more leverage. Learn how pricing and trade-in details can affect your deal. What should buyers watch before they negotiate?

item.title: Car Dealer Dispute and Car Buying Insights
item.description: A closer look at a car dealership dispute and what it reveals about the buying process, from pricing transparency to contract details and customer communication. The video highlights practical insights that can help buyers avoid common pitfalls and make more informed decisions when purchasing a vehicle.

media:content.media:title: Car Dealer Dispute and Car Buying Insights
media:content.media:description: A closer look at a car dealership dispute and what it reveals about the buying process, from pricing transparency to contract details and customer communication. The video highlights practical insights that can help buyers avoid common pitfalls and make more informed decisions when purchasing a vehicle.

item.title: Minivan Drivers and Dealer Reactions
item.description: A look at why this group gets every dealer talking, with a focus on car buying and buyer protection. What stands out most to dealers?

media:content.media:title: Minivan Drivers and Dealer Reactions
media:content.media:description: A look at why this group gets every dealer talking, with a focus on car buying and buyer protection. What stands out most to dealers?

item.title: Used Car Warning That Could Save You Thousands
item.description: A quick check now can keep the dealer from getting the first move. Learn how to spot dealer fees and protect your budget when buying a used car. What should you check before you visit the dealership?

media:content.media:title: Used Car Warning That Could Save You Thousands
media:content.media:description: A quick check now can keep the dealer from getting the first move. Learn how to spot dealer fees and protect your budget when buying a used car. What should you check before you visit the dealership?

item.title: Hidden Fees to Watch Before You Sign
item.description: Know what they’re hiding so you don’t get trapped at the desk. Learn what to watch for in the finance office and how hidden fees can affect your car deal. What should buyers check before signing?

media:content.media:title: Hidden Fees to Watch Before You Sign
media:content.media:description: Know what they’re hiding so you don’t get trapped at the desk. Learn what to watch for in the finance office and how hidden fees can affect your car deal. What should buyers check before signing?

item.title: $10,000 Cars Worth Buying Right Now
item.description: A look at cars worth considering at the $10,000 price point, with a focus on real-world value and practical buying decisions. Which options stand out for your budget?

media:content.media:title: $10,000 Cars Worth Buying Right Now
media:content.media:description: A look at cars worth considering at the $10,000 price point, with a focus on real-world value and practical buying decisions. Which options stand out for your budget?
